# Dancing with the Northern Lights
## Scripture
"For the Lord is the great God, the great King above all gods. In his hand are the depths of the earth, and the mountain peaks belong to him. The sea is his, for he made it, and his hands formed the dry land." - Psalm 95:3-5

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the breathtaking display of the Northern Lights, we are reminded of God's majestic power and creativity. The swirling dance of colors across the night sky is a testament to the beauty and wonder of His creation. Just as the Northern Lights illuminate the darkness, God's presence in our lives brings light and hope to our darkest moments. As we marvel at the celestial display, let us not forget the greatness of our God, who is the King above all kings and the Creator of the universe.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we watch the Northern Lights dance across the sky, we are filled with awe and wonder at Your creation. Help us to remember Your presence in our lives, illuminating our path and guiding us through life's challenges. May we always be mindful of Your greatness and majesty, and may our hearts be filled with praise and worship for You. Thank You for the beauty of Your creation and the hope that it brings to our lives. Amen.
